productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Ivory Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Cream polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, appliqued and embroidered branding on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash similar colours together Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The classic styling on this tee makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair it with denims and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
